displayTitle: The Clone Wars S04E16: Friends and Enemies
synopsis: Disguised as Bounty Hunter Rako Hardeen, Obi-Wan Kenobi is on the run with criminal mastermind Moralo Eval and Cad Bane. But their partnership is on thin ice and Anakin and Ahsoka are in hot pursuit.
title: The Clone Wars S04E16: Friends and Enemies
